zh.St Michael & All Angels Churchyard, Houg: 葡萄牙亞速爾群島奧 米格爾
zh.Lumley, Durham, England: 英國英格蘭達勒姆盧姆利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibill Lumley於1485年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆盧姆利時，她的父親Sir Thomas Lumley28歲，母親Elizabeth Plantagenet21歲。她於大約1510年與Sir William Hilton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1519年在英國達勒姆森德藍德享年34歲，埋葬在葡萄牙亞速爾群島奧 米格爾。

zh-hans.St Michael & All Angels Churchyard, Houg: 葡萄牙亚速尔群岛奧 米格爾
zh-hans.Lumley, Durham, England: 英国英格兰達勒姆盧姆利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibill Lumley于1485年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆盧姆利时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Lumley28岁，母亲Elizabeth Plantagenet21岁。她于大约1510年与Sir William Hilton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1519年在英国達勒姆森德藍德享年34岁，埋葬在葡萄牙亚速尔群岛奧 米格爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lumley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Lumley, a place in County Durham, so named from Old English lum(m) ‘pool’ (see Lum 1) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Lum
meanings: English: habitational name from Lumb in Lancashire. In some instances the name may be topographic for someone who lived by a pool, Middle English lum(m).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 林 (see   Lin   1) and 藍 (see   Lan   1), based on their Cantonese pronunciations.

variants.name: Lemley
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Lumley  .

nameMeanings.name: Sibill
meanings: A female name, another spelling of Sybil, corrupted from Isabel.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibill Lumley was born in 1485, in Lumley, Durham, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Lumley, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Plantagenet, was 21. She married Sir William Hilton about 1510. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1519, in Sunderland, Durham, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in São Miguel, Azores, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibill Lumley est née en 1485, à Lumley, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Lumley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Plantagenet, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Hilton environ 1510. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1519, à Sunderland, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à São Miguel, Açores, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibill Lumley 1485 in Lumley, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Lumley 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Plantagenet 21. Sie hat um 1510 Sir William Hilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1519 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Sunderland, Durham, England und wurde in São Miguel, Azoren, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibill Lumley è nata il nel 1485 nel Lumley, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Lumley, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Plantagenet, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Hilton circa 1510. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1519, nel Sunderland, Durham, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a São Miguel, Azzorre, Portogallo.

ja.Hilton, Durham, England: イギリスダルハムヒルトン
ja.St Michael & All Angels Churchyard, Houg: ポルトガルアゾレス諸島スaオ ミグエル
ja.Lumley, Durham, England: イギリスイギリスダルハムルムリー
ja.Sunderland, Durham, England: イギリスダルハムスンダーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Sibill Lumleyが1485年にイギリスイギリスダルハムルムリーで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Lumleyは28歳，母Elizabeth Plantagenetは21歳であった。約1510年にSir William Hiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1519年にイギリスダルハムスンダーランドで34歳で死去し，ポルトガルアゾレス諸島スaオ ミグエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibill Lumley(이)가 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 럼리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Lumley(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Plantagenet(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1510년 Sir William Hilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 뒤람 선델랜드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 아조 레스 스a오 미구얼에 묻혔다.

mn.Lumley, Durham, England: Lumley, Durham, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibill Lumley nasceu em 1485, em Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Lumley, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Plantagenet, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Hilton aproximadamente 1510. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1519, em Sunderland, Durham, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em São Miguel, Açores, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibill Lumley родилась в 1485 г. в местности лумли, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Lumley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Plantagenet, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Hilton около 1510 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1519 г. в местности сундирланд, дурам, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности сaо мигуел, Азорские острова, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibill Lumley nació en 1485, en Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Lumley, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Plantagenet, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir William Hilton aproximadamente 1510. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1519, en Sunderland, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en São Miguel, Açores, Portugal.
